query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION SEPARATOR ', ') as cols FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'maintenance_tickets' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3kTaiYRMPpnS3sR.17f9e41a6e58 --database UcUrociZeo4QVAHHN9vAuZ --execute SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION SEPARATOR ', ') as cols FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'maintenance_tickets' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
